# HTML to Image/PDF API

High-performance API for converting URLs or HTML to PNG, JPG, and PDF. 
Convert any URL or raw HTML into a pixel-perfect PNG, JPEG, or PDF with a single API call. Screenshotly runs a real Chromium browser on every request — no headless quirks, no rendering shortcuts.

## Key Features
Website screenshot API — capture any public URL as PNG or JPEG
HTML to image — render raw HTML strings directly to PNG or JPEG
HTML to PDF — convert HTML to PDF with A4/Letter page sizes, portrait or landscape
URL to PDF — generate PDFs from any live webpage
Full-page screenshot — capture the entire scrollable page, not just the viewport
Custom viewport — set width and height to simulate any device or resolution
Wait for element — pass a CSS selector and Screenshotly waits until it appears before capturing
JPEG quality control — tune file size vs quality with a 1–100 quality setting
Synchronous mode — result returned inline in the HTTP response (up to 30s)
Async job queue — submit a job, get a job ID back immediately, poll or receive a webhook when done
Webhook delivery — POST the finished file URL to your endpoint automatically
Presigned download URLs — results stored securely in cloud storage with time-limited download links

## Common Use Cases
Automated website screenshot monitoring
HTML invoice / report to PDF generation
Open Graph image generation from HTML templates
Web archiving and page snapshots
Visual regression testing pipelines
Thumbnail generation for URL previews
Proof-of-delivery screenshots for ad campaigns
No-code automation workflows (Zapier, Make, n8n)

## Links
- Documentation, Demo & Keys: https://rapidapi.com/stharris97/api/screenshotly1
